brief:
# CashPulse вҖ” Screen 3: Spending Insights ## UX Research Brief --- ## 1. Brief Overview | Field | Detail | |-------|--------| | **Screen** | Screen 3 вҖ” Spending Insights | | **Product** | CashPulse Personal Expense Tracker | | **Platform** | Desktop (primary), responsive down to 768px | | **Design Theme** | Dark navy, premium fintech, amber/teal accents | | **Brief Version** | 1.0 | | **Status** | Ready for Design Execution | --- ## 2. User Needs Analysis ### 2.1 Primary User Goals | Priority | Goal | Insight Signal | |----------|------|----------------| | P0 | Understand total spending health for a given month at a glance | Period Summary Header вҖ” three-stat strip | | P0 | Identify which days drove overspending | Daily Spending Chart with average line | | P1 | Know which categories consume the most budget | Top Categories stacked breakdown | | P1 | Quickly recall and contextualise largest individual purchases | Biggest Expenses ranked list | | P2 | Benchmark current month against prior behaviour | Month-over-month Comparison Card | | P2 | Extract data for personal records or external analysis | Export CSV action | ### 2.2 Secondary User Goals - Navigating freely across months without losing orientation - Reading trend direction (improving vs. worsening) without mental arithmetic - Scanning the screen efficiently in under 10 seconds to surface the most important signal ### 2.3 User Mental Models - Users expect **summary вҶ’ detail** hierarchy: headline number first, supporting breakdown second - Financial dashboards are associated with **bank app conventions**: clean rows, right-aligned amounts, progress bars for budget consumption - Toggle controls (Bar/Line) follow a **segmented control** pattern familiar from analytics tools (Google Analytics, Notion charts) - A ranked list implies **sorting by magnitude** вҖ” users will assume #1 is always the highest value --- ## 3. Information Architecture ### 3.1 Content Hierarchy ``` Screen 3: Spending Insights в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ [Global Top Bar] в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ Logo (nav home) в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ Navigation Tabs (Dashboard | Add Expense | Insights вҶҗ active) в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ Month/Year Selector + Settings Gear в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ 1. Period Summary Header вҶҗ "What happened this month?" в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ Total Spent + trend в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ Daily Average + trend в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ Transaction Count + trend в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ 2. Daily Spending Chart вҶҗ "When did I spend?" в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ Bar/Line Toggle в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ Day-by-day bars or line в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ Average dashed reference line в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ 3. Top Categories вҶҗ "Where did money go?" в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ Stacked proportional bar в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ Per-category rows (progress + amount + %) в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ 4. Biggest Expenses вҶҗ "What were the standout purchases?" в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ Ranked list (top 5) в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ 5. Month Comparison вҶҗ "Am I improving?" в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ Side-by-side bar visual в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ Delta summary badge в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ Export CSV Button вҶҗ "Take data elsewhere" ``` ### 3.2 Content Grouping Rationale - **Period Summary is pinned first**: it answers the headline question immediately, reducing need to scroll to understand the month's status - **Chart precedes category breakdown**: temporal context (when spending happened) aids interpretation of category totals (what was spent) - **Biggest Expenses follows categories**: after seeing aggregate category data, the user naturally wants to drill to individual items responsible - **Comparison is placed last**: it requires context from earlier sections to be meaningful; placing it last feels like a conclusion - **Export is an escape hatch**: low-frequency action, right-aligned, visually subordinate вҖ” should not compete with analytical content --- ## 4. Component Specifications ### 4.1 Period Summary Header **Purpose:** Deliver three critical KPIs in one scannable row without requiring any interaction. **Structure:** ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ $1,247.50 $41.58 30 в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Total Spent в”Ӯ Daily Average в”Ӯ Transactions в”Ӯ в”Ӯ вҶ“ 12% vs last в”Ӯ вҶ‘ 5% vs last в”Ӯ вҶ“ 3 vs last в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ ``` **Design Decisions:** - Three equal-width cells with 1px vertical dividers (40px tall, `slate-border`) вҖ” dividers create separation without heavy borders - Values use `heading-1` (24px, 700, DM Sans) adapted as Amount Secondary style; labels use `label` (12px, 500, DM Mono) - Trend indicators use arrow glyphs (вҶ‘ вҶ“) paired with colour вҖ” **never colour alone** (WCAG AA compliance) - Emerald/teal (`#14B8A6`) for favourable trends (spending down); coral-error (`#F87171`) for unfavourable (spending up) - Transaction count trend uses absolute delta ("вҶ“ 3") rather than percentage вҖ” count data is integer-based and percentage feels misleading **Interaction:** None. Auto-computed. Refreshes when month selector changes (counter animation, 400ms ease-out). --- ### 4.2 Daily Spending Chart **Purpose:** Reveal temporal spending patterns вҖ” clusters, spikes, quiet periods. **Header Controls:** ``` Daily Spending [Bar] [Line] ``` - Toggle group: two chips, 32px height, 8px radius - Selected state: `gold-amber` background, `deep-navy` text (brand-aligned) - Unselected: `navy-raised` background, `muted-text` text **Chart Canvas:** 100% card width Г— 200px height **Bar Chart Spec:** - Bars fill full month width; each bar = one calendar day - Default fill: `gold-amber` (brand primary, readable on dark surface) - Bars exceeding 2Г— daily average: `coral-error` fill вҖ” visual spike alert - X-axis: labels at days 1, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30 (caption, `muted-text`) вҖ” prevents crowding - Y-axis: 4 gridlines with amount labels (caption, `muted-text`); gridline colour: `slate-border` at 40% opacity - Entrance animation: bars grow from baseline, 600ms, staggered 30ms per bar (skipped under `prefers-reduced-motion`) **Line Chart Spec:** - Smooth cubic bezier curve, `gold-amber`, 2px stroke - Fill below curve: `gold-amber` at 8% opacity - Data points: 6px circles, `gold-amber` fill, `navy-surface` 2px stroke вҖ” maintains legibility against fill area **Average Reference Line:** - Dashed horizontal (`amber-500`-equivalent, `gold-amber` at 60% opacity), 1px, 4/4 dash pattern - Right-end label: "avg $66.67" (caption, `gold-amber`) вҖ” anchored so it never overlaps chart data area **Hover Tooltip:** ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ Mar 15 в”Ӯ вҶҗ caption, muted-text в”Ӯ $67.30 в”Ӯ вҶҗ heading-3, silver-text в”Ӯ 3 transactionsв”Ӯ вҶҗ label, muted-text в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ ``` - Elevation level 2 shadow; 8px radius; `navy-raised` background - Appears 150ms fade-in; keyboard accessible via Tab (focus moves bar-by-bar) --- ### 4.3 Top Categories Breakdown **Purpose:** Show proportional budget distribution and absolute spend per category. **Stacked Bar:** - 100% width, 12px height, 6px radius (pill-capped ends) - Segments coloured per category palette (PRD В§4.3.1 вҖ” maintained from brand spec for recognisability across screens) - Animation: segments reveal left-to-right, 600ms ease-out on load **Category Rows:** ``` в—Ҹ Food & Dining [в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘] $380.00 В· 30% в—Ҹ Transport [в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘] $290.00 В· 23% в—Ҹ Shopping [в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘] $210.00 В· 17% ... ``` | Zone | Element | Style | |------|---------|-------| | Left | 10px colour dot + category name | body (14px, 400, DM Mono), `silver-text` | | Centre | Progress bar 120px Г— 6px | Track: `slate-border`; Fill: category colour | | Right | Amount + percentage | Small amount (14px, 600) + caption (12px, `muted-text`) | - Rows sorted highest-to-lowest spend вҖ” matches user expectation for ranked data - Row height: 44px (meets 44px minimum touch target height per design tokens) - Hover: row background вҶ’ `navy-raised` (150ms); progress bar fill brightens 15% - Stacked bar segment hover: 2px upward lift (150ms); tooltip matches chart tooltip pattern --- ### 4.4 Biggest Expenses **Purpose:** Surface the five most impactful individual transactions for quick recall and awareness. **Row Structure:** ``` [в‘ ] Rent Payment $1,185.00 Bills & Utilities В· Mar 1 ``` | Zone | Element | Style | |------|---------|-------| | Rank circle | 28px diameter | Rank #1: `gold-amber` bg, `deep-navy` text; Others: `navy-raised` bg, `muted-text` text | | Merchant | Primary line | body (14px, 400, DM Mono), `silver-text` | | Meta | Category В· Date | label (12px, 500), `muted-text` | | Amount | Right-aligned | small amount (14px, 600, DM Mono), `silver-text` | - Row height: 52px - Dividers: 1px `slate-border` between rows (no divider after last row) - No hover interaction required вҖ” this is a read-only ranked list - Maximum 5 rows вҖ” prevents the card from dominating the page **Accessibility note:** Rank circles must have `aria-label="Rank 1"` etc.; do not rely solely on position or colour to convey ranking. --- ### 4.5 Month-over-Month Comparison Card **Purpose:** Give a directional verdict вҖ” is spending trending better or worse? **Visual Layout:** ``` Last Month This Month в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳ в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳ в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳ в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳ в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳ в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳ $1,389 $1,247 в•”в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•— в•‘ вң“ You spent $142 less в•‘ в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қ ``` **Bar Spec:** - Width: 60px each; Max height: 120px; Gap: 24px - Last Month bar: `slate-border` fill (neutral, receded) - This Month bar: `gold-amber` fill (primary emphasis) - Amount labels below each bar: caption, `muted-text` (last month) / `silver-text` (this month) - Column labels above: "Last Month" (caption, `muted-text`) / "This Month" (caption, `silver-text`) - Bars grow from baseline on load (600ms ease-out) **Summary Badge:** - Favourable (spent less): `teal-success` text on `teal-success` at 10% opacity background, pill shape (9999 radius) - Unfavourable (spent more): `coral-error` text on `coral-error` at 10% opacity background, pill shape - Body text: "You spent $142 less" / "You spent $142 more" - Badge width: auto, centred below bars --- ### 4.6 Export CSV Button **Placement:** Below all cards, right-aligned. Below the comparison card with 24px top margin. **Spec:** ``` [вҶ“ Export CSV] ``` - Height: 40px; 10px radius; `navy-raised` background; 1px `slate-border` border - Text: "Export CSV" (body, `silver-text`) with download icon (16px, `muted-text`) left of text - Hover: `navy-raised` вҶ’ slight lighten to `#2E3D50` (150ms); border вҶ’ `gold-amber` - Active: "вң“ Exported" text with `teal-success` colour (1.5s auto-revert) - Minimum click target: 40px height Г— min 120px width --- ## 5. Interaction Patterns ### 5.1 Interaction Inventory | Component | Trigger | Response | Duration | |-----------|---------|----------|----------| | Month Selector вҶҗ chevron | Click | All data re-renders; stats counter-animate; charts re-animate from baseline | 400ms counters, 600ms charts | | Month Selector вҶ’ chevron | Click | Same as above, forward direction | Same | | Bar/Line Toggle | Click | Chart morphs between types; selected chip highlights | 250ms ease-in-out | | Chart Bar / Line Point | Hover | Tooltip fades in near cursor | 150ms fade-in | | Chart Bar / Line Point | Tab focus | Tooltip appears on keyboard focus (same content) | 150ms | | Stacked Bar Segment | Hover | Segment lifts 2px; tooltip appears | 150ms | | Category Row | Hover | Row background darkens; progress bar brightens | 150ms | | Export CSV | Click | Button text вҶ’ "вң“ Exported" in `teal-success`; reverts after 1.5s | 150ms transition, 1.5s hold | ### 5.2 State Machine: Bar/Line Toggle ``` [Bar Selected] в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ click "Line" в”Җв”ҖвҶ’ [Transitioning 250ms] в”Җв”ҖвҶ’ [Line Selected] [Line Selected] в”Җв”Җв”Җ click "Bar" в”Җв”ҖвҶ’ [Transitioning 250ms] в”Җв”ҖвҶ’ [Bar Selected] ``` During transition: bars shrink to zero height (or line collapses to baseline), then new type animates in. Ensures visual continuity without jarring flash. ### 5.3 Month Navigation Data Flow ``` Chevron click в”Ӯ в–ј Month state updates в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ Period Summary вҶ’ counter animation (400ms, staggered 50ms per stat) в”ңв”Җв”Җ Daily Chart вҶ’ bars/line re-animate from baseline (600ms) в”ңв”Җв”Җ Stacked Category Bar вҶ’ re-animates left-to-right (600ms) в”ңв”Җв”Җ Comparison Card вҶ’ bars re-grow (600ms) в””в”Җв”Җ Biggest Expenses вҶ’ rows fade in (200ms staggered) ``` --- ## 6. Accessibility Specification ### 6.1 WCAG AA Requirements | Requirement | Implementation | |-------------|----------------| | Colour contrast вҖ” body text | `silver-text` (#CBD5E1) on `navy-surface` (#1E293B) вҶ’ 10.5:1 вң“ | | Colour contrast вҖ” muted text | `muted-text` (#64748B) on `navy-surface` вҖ” **requires audit**; may need lightening to #8899AA for AA compliance on dark backgrounds | | Colour not sole indicator | Trend arrows use вҶ‘вҶ“ glyphs + colour; badge uses text label + colour | | Chart accessibility | `role="img"` + `aria-label="Bar chart showing daily spending for [Month Year], averaging $[X] per day"` | | Keyboard navigation | Tab through chart bars/points; tooltip appears on focus (identical to hover) | | Focus rings | 2px `gold-amber` outline, 2px offset on all interactive elements | | Minimum touch targets | All interactive elements вүҘ 44Г—44px (per design tokens) | | Escape key | Dismisses tooltips, dropdowns | | Reduced motion | All animations replaced with instant renders; counter animation disabled; chart appears at final state | ### 6.2 ARIA Landmarks and Roles ```html
...
...
    ...
...
``` ### 6.3 Screen Reader Announcements | Event | Announcement | |-------|-------------| | Month changes | "Showing data for [Month Year]. Total spent: $X." (live region, polite) | | Toggle switches | "Chart type changed to Line chart" (status role) | | Export completes | "Data exported successfully" (live region, polite) | | Tooltip on bar focus | "March 15: $67.30, 3 transactions" (via `aria-describedby`) | --- ## 7. Empty & Error States ### 7.1 No Data for Selected Month | Component | Empty State Treatment | |-----------|----------------------| | Period Summary | All three values show "$0.00" or "0"; trend indicators hidden (no prior context) | | Daily Chart | Centered placeholder: bar-chart outline icon (48px, `slate-border`) + "Not enough data yet" (body, `muted-text`) | | Top Categories | Same placeholder icon + message | | Biggest Expenses | Same placeholder | | Comparison Card | Left bar (last month) may still render; right bar is empty; badge hidden | | Export CSV | Button disabled (`opacity: 0.38`, cursor: not-allowed, `aria-disabled="true"`) вҖ” no data to export | ### 7.2 Partial Data (< 7 days of month recorded) - Chart renders only available days вҖ” no visual gaps implied for future days - Average line is computed only from days with data - Summary badge in comparison card uses caveat text: "Partial month data" --- ## 8. Responsive Behaviour | Breakpoint | Adaptation | |------------|------------| | > 1440px | Max-width 720px centred; generous whitespace; all cards at full spec | | 1024вҖ“1440px | Max-width 680px; chart height 200px; standard spacing | | 768вҖ“1024px | Max-width 560px; chart height reduced to 160px; Period Summary stacks to single column (3 rows); Comparison Card bars reduce to 48px wide | | < 768px | Out of primary scope; horizontal scroll permitted on chart; Category rows truncate names with ellipsis | ### 8.1 Period Summary Responsive Collapse ``` Desktop (3 columns): [Total Spent] | [Daily Average] | [Transactions] 768вҖ“1024px (single column stacked): [Total Spent] в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ [Daily Average] в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ [Transactions] ``` Dividers rotate from vertical to horizontal (1px `slate-border` full width). --- ## 9. Design Token Reconciliation The PRD specifies an Inter/white-background design system; the `designTokens` file specifies a dark navy DM Sans/DM Mono system. **The dark token system takes precedence** per the `brandSpec` directive. The following mappings apply for this screen: | PRD Token | Resolved Token | Value | |-----------|---------------|-------| | `white` (card surface) | `navy-surface` | #1E293B | | `gray-100` (page background) | `deep-navy` | #0F172A | | `gray-900` (primary text) | `silver-text` | #CBD5E1 | | `gray-500` (secondary text) | `muted-text` | #64748B | | `blue-600` (primary CTA) | `gold-amber` | #F59E0B | | `blue-100` (selected state) | `gold-amber` at 10% opacity | вҖ” | | `emerald-500` (positive) | `teal-success` | #14B8A6 | | `red-500` (negative/error) | `coral-error` | #F87171 | | `amber-500` (average line) | `gold-amber` at 60% opacity | вҖ” | | Card shadow | Elevation level 1 | `0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)` | --- ## 10. Open Questions & Risks | # | Issue | Severity | Recommended Resolution | |---|-------|----------|----------------------| | 1 | `muted-text` (#64748B) on `navy-surface` (#1E293B) may fail WCAG AA contrast (requires 4.5:1 for small text) | **High** | Lighten secondary text to #8B98A8 or use `silver-text` for all body-level content | | 2 | Bar/Line toggle morph at 250ms вҖ” complex SVG interpolation may cause jank on lower-end hardware | Medium | Test with CSS transform approach (scale bars to 0, swap, re-grow) rather than path interpolation | | 3 | Month selector in top bar affects all three screens вҖ” if a user navigates away mid-month change, state must persist | Medium | Month selection should be global app state, not local to Screen 3 | | 4 | Export CSV with no defined data schema вҖ” PRD does not specify column names or row format | Medium | Define export schema in next PRD iteration: Date, Merchant, Category, Amount, Payment Method, Note | | 5 | Biggest Expenses list shows only 5 items вҖ” power users may want to see more | Low | Consider a "See all" text link below the list that expands to full list (lazy-load, 200ms slide-down) | | 6 | Stacked bar hover "lifts segment 2px" вҖ” CSS clip-path required; verify cross-browser behaviour | Low | Prototype in target browser before finalising; fallback to opacity change only | --- ## 11. Design Deliverable Checklist - [ ] Period Summary Header вҖ” 3-cell row with trend indicators - [ ] Daily Spending Chart вҖ” bar variant (default state) - [ ] Daily Spending Chart вҖ” line variant (toggled state) - [ ] Chart hover tooltip component - [ ] Bar/Line toggle control (both states) - [ ] Average reference line with label - [ ] Top Categories stacked bar (filled + hover state) - [ ] Top Categories row list (default + hover state) - [ ] Biggest Expenses ranked list (#1 highlighted, #2вҖ“5 standard) - [ ] Month Comparison card (both favourable and unfavourable badge variants) - [ ] Export CSV button (default, hover, exported states) - [ ] Empty state treatment for all five cards - [ ] Responsive layout at 768px breakpoint - [ ] Focus ring states on all interactive elements - [ ] Reduced-motion variant (static, no animation)
